name: Potato Pancake No. 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and wash them with cold water. Drain thoroughly.
2. Grate the potatoes immediately and drain off any excess water that collects.
3. Mix the grated potatoes, onion, flour, cooked bacon bits, beaten eggs, black pepper, and salt in a large bowl until well combined.
4. Heat butter or margarine in a skillet over medium heat.
5. When the butter is hot but not smoking, drop about 1/3 cup of batter into the skillet for each pancake.
6. Flatten the pancakes slightly with a spatula.
7. Cook until golden brown on one side, then turn and cook until golden brown on the other side.
8. Repeat with remaining batter.
9. This recipe should yield approximately 12 pancakes. Serve with sour cream.
